tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All laboratory values are within or very close to normal ranges, except for a mildly elevated chloride and slightly decreased total CO₂, which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis or compensation but are not clinically significant in isolation. Renal, glycemic, and lipid profiles are unremarkable. No acute laboratory concerns identified. Recommend clinical correlation.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
